feed.title: Kyhle Öhlinger
feed.subtitle: Hi all, My name is Kyhle Öhlinger and this blog post forms part of my personal blog. If you enjoy any of the posts, feel free to reach out and let me know :)

entry.title: WithSecure AI Challenge - My LLM Doctor

link.title: WithSecure AI Challenge - My LLM Doctor

entry.summary: WithSecure recently released My LLM Doctor - a generative AI (GenAI) security challenge: WithSecure - MyLLMDoctor The purpose of this CTF is to experiment with multi-chain prompt injection which WithSecure recently released a blog post on. The promptingguide.ai defines multi-chain prompts as follows: To improve the reliability and performance of LLMs, one of the important prompt engineeri...

entry.title: From Curiosity to Creativity: My Thoughts on Prompt Engineering

link.title: From Curiosity to Creativity: My Thoughts on Prompt Engineering

entry.summary: Over the last few months, I have been attempting to learn more about Large Language Models (LLMs) and, as a result, I stumbled across prompt engineering and prompt engineering attacks. To improve my own knowledge of different LLM models and their susceptibility to attack, I have completed a few CTFs including ones from Wiz and WithSecure. If you haven’t seen them already, I have writeups for bo...

entry.title: WithSecure AI Challenge - My LLM Bank

link.title: WithSecure AI Challenge - My LLM Bank

entry.summary: WithSecure recently released My LLM Bank - a generative AI (GenAI) security challenge: WithSecure - MyLLMBank This challenge allows you to experiment with jailbreaks/prompt injection against LLM chat agents that use ReAct to call tools. This blog post contains the methods that I used while completing this challenge - if you are reading this, I hope you find it useful! Reason + Act (ReA...

entry.title: Leveraging Google Apps Script for Workflow Automation

link.title: Leveraging Google Apps Script for Workflow Automation

entry.summary: In today’s cloud-driven environment, automation plays a critical role in optimizing workflows and enhancing operational efficiency by minimizing manual interaction. Manual tasks, especially when dealing with sensitive data, introduce risks such as human error, data mismanagement, and inefficiencies. By automating processes such as email notifications, data synchronization, and report generation...

entry.title: Reducing your Attack Surface by Limiting Cloud Services

link.title: Reducing your Attack Surface by Limiting Cloud Services

entry.summary: The cloud is confusing. Not only are there numerous services competing for your attention, the number of services per cloud service provider (CSP) are also increasing every year. It is difficult enough for companies to try and secure the services that they make use of, let alone the hundreds of services that they do not use in any way, shape, or form. This begs the question, if the services are...
